title: Solution Advisor Senior Specialist - Finance
description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.  

As a Solution Advisor Senior Specialist for SAP Cloud ERP Finance, you will influence the cloud transformation journeys of Italy’s leading enterprises. You will engage directly with CFOs, Finance Leaders, and transformation teams, shaping their vision and guiding their adoption of SAP’s Digital Core. This is a senior, customer‑facing role with strategic impact across presales, deal strategy, and partner enablement. You will be the go‑to expert for all solution\-related questions within the sales cycle, ensuring SAP’s value proposition is clearly articulated and consistently reinforced across all touchpoints.

**What you’ll do**
------------------

  

Deal Strategy \& Customer Engagement

  

* Drive discovery, qualification, and solution strategy for key opportunities across industries.
* Deliver high‑impact presentations and demos of SAP Cloud ERP Finance (AP, AR, GL, Cash Management, Receivables Management, etc.).
* Lead digital discovery engagements, roadmap assessments, and cloud readiness workshops.
* Present SAP’s competitive differentiation and showcase innovations (Business AI, Sustainability, Industry Best Practices).
* Create memorable, insight‑driven customer experiences through strong storytelling, preparation, and demo excellence.
* Provide both standard and customized solution demonstrations that bring SAP solutions to life and show customers the value of SAP.
* Support the Account Team by delivering solution presentations and events to identify and qualify new opportunities.
* Evaluate account qualification criteria to determine investment required for strategic pursuits.
* Engage customers throughout the lifecycle to reinforce SAP’s vision and support adoption \& renewal readiness.

  

Market \& Business Development

  

* Participate in demand generation initiatives to support pipeline creation for SAP Cloud ERP
* Represent SAP at marketing and industry events.
* Drive adoption of digital assets and presales tools.
* Leverage digital content from the Global Digital Content Factory in all customer engagements (demos, presentations, assets).
* Collaborate with the sales teams to build compelling storylines and competitive differentiation.

  

Partner Ecosystem Enablement

  

* Mentor and educate partners to strengthen their presales and solution capabilities.
* Support partner\-led opportunities to scale SAP presence in the Italian market.
* Effectively transition pre‑sales engagement to SAP Services or Implementation Partners for seamless customer deployment.

  

Sales Enablement

  

* Lead enablement sessions for Sales teams across EMEA.
* Provide domain expertise in Finance processes and cloud transformation best practices.
* Establish yourself as a thought leader within Account Teams and contribute to account strategy.
* Conduct vigorous dry runs for strategic customer engagements to ensure high‑quality execution.

**What you bring**
------------------

* Bachelor’s or master’s in accounting, Finance, or related fields; MBA preferred.
* Certified or trained in SAP Cloud ERP Finance.
* Strong understanding of Italian statutory requirements (Fatturazione Elettronica, electronic reporting, tax compliance).
* 5\+ years of experience in SAP solutions, Cloud ERP, or relevant Lines of Business.
* Working knowledge of Cloud, Hosted Services, SaaS, and PaaS models in a Business\-to\-Business environment.
* Proven ability to engage and build lasting customer relationships.
* Ability to quickly understand customer business goals and translate them into tailored solutions.
* Passion for storytelling – crafting engaging narratives and compelling presentations.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross\-functionally
* Fluency in English and Italian.

 **Bring out your best**  

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end\-to\-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose\-driven and future\-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
  

  

**We win with inclusion**  

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well\-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.  

  

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e\-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.  

  

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.  

  

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.  

  

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor. **AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

title: Solution Advisor Expert - Sovereign Cloud
description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. **What you'll do**

  

The geopolitical situation coupled with the increasing number of regulations emerging across the globe, manifest a major opportunity for SAP to grow and capitalize on the value proposition of our Sovereign Cloud (SC) offering and our early mover advantage in this space based on the investments made in selected key target markets.

  

As we further build out our regional \& local capabilities to drive holistic sales cycles and bookings growth for our Sovereign Cloud offerings, we are looking for Sovereign Cloud Solution Advisors to support driving SC to the next wave of success.

  



Strategy, value proposition and customer demand

  

* Drive internal \& external mindshare on SC, support in refining and promoting the vision and value of Sovereign Cloud in the context of the overall SAP cloud narrative.
* Help diversify the overall Sovereign Cloud value proposition and execution strategy considering local market specifics.
* Collaborate closely with marketing and respective teams to play a key role in customer\-facing events and campaigns, presenting SAP SC solution capabilities, value proposition and key differentiators to further stimulate demand.
* Play a key role in account discovery, qualifying leads and generating a strong pipeline for SC in the target market through close collaboration with marketing, demand management, local sales / account teams, SC CoE \& presales, partners and in account planning and targeted customer engagements.
* Closely collaborate with global and local business functions critical for the success of SC as well as with the local SC delivery and operations team.

  

Customer engagements:

  

* Act as a trusted advisor, guiding customer executives and SAP teams on Sovereign Cloud throughout the customer value journey.
* Collaborate closely as part of account teams and with key partners in the market to support engagements with expertise to help generate demand, progress key deals and grow bookings.
* Partner with sales teams to identify further revenue opportunities and support account strategies.
* Support key customer engagements and act as a multiplier for the customer facing teams.
* Advise and support account team in creating a compelling and competitive proposal
* In RFP scenarios, drive progress and act as liaison between local and global teams to provide responses to SC related requirements

  

Build scale, adoption and standardization for SC engagements:

  

* Engage and enable key partners such as GSSPs/SIs on Sovereign cloud to drive further scale through the ecosystem.
* Support local and regional enablement for internal and external stakeholders
* Run and support non\-functional requirement workshops with customers, GS2/Secrecy Office and VAT team
* Facilitate discussions and drive demand intake for local/regional SC portfolio requirements
* Establish and foster an active community of Sovereign Cloud advisor experts across the markets and share experiences with other SC markets.
* Act as a key feedback channel for customers \& the account team into SC global leadership, engineering and the portfolio process including product and adoption feedback.

title: Solution Engineer Associate
description:
Working at Infobip means being part of something truly global. With 75\+ offices across six continents, we’re not just building technology — we’re shaping how more than 80% of the world connects and communicates.

  

As employees, we take pride in contributing to the world’s largest and only full\-stack cloud communication platform. But it’s not just what we do, it’s how we do it: with curiosity, passion, and a whole lot of collaboration.

  

We operate with an AI\-first mindset, embedding intelligent tools into our daily workflows to work smarter and more efficiently. Every role here benefits from and contributes to this approach.

  

If you're looking for meaningful work and challenges that grow you in a culture where people show up with purpose, this is your opportunity.


Let’s build what’s next, together.


**What this role is all about**


As an Associate Solution Engineer, you will join Infobip’s Solution Engineering division in an entry\-level role focused on learning our products, solutions, and customer businesses. Working under the supervision of a mentor and senior team members, you will participate in solution proposals, solution design, delivery, and integrations. This role offers exposure to both technical and commercial aspects of Infobip’s solutions, with the opportunity to grow as a generalist or gradually specialize in areas such as CX consultancy, solution and product expertise, or industry focus. Your core mission is to help customers understand the value of Infobip’s solutions and services while continuously developing your skills.

**What you’ll do**

* Develop a foundational understanding of customers’ businesses to identify which Infobip solutions and products best support their growth
* Assist in designing new and innovative solutions aligned with customer business needs
* Collect technical requirements and design simple technical solutions and service integration plans
* Support the handling of technical and security questionnaires
* Conduct engaging demos and proofs of concept (POCs)
* Assist with scoping exercises and contribute to service quote estimations
* Support the implementation of solutions for new and existing customers
* Deliver clear, comprehensive technical documentation
* Configure and implement Infobip solutions based on customer requirements
* Conduct training and solution enablement sessions for SMB customers and document outcomes with meeting minutes and summaries
* Contribute to internal initiatives, document best practices, and share knowledge through departmental communities of practice
* Build understanding of local market requirements and trends
* Continuously learn Infobip’s products and solutions, both technically and commercially, staying up to date with changes and upgrades

**What makes you a strong fit**

* Degree in engineering, computer science, information technology, or a similar field
* 1 to 2 years of experience in a similar or related role
* Strong interest in understanding business problems and customer needs, demonstrated through internships, university projects, case studies, or hackathons
* Hands\-on exposure to AI and LLM solutions, such as chatbots or agents, prompt engineering, basic retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG), or API integrations, gained through academic or personal projects
* Strong communication and collaboration skills across teams and stakeholders
* Fluent in spoken and written in English and Italian
* Solid problem\-solving and troubleshooting skills with moderate guidance
* Structured, detail\-oriented, and reliable in a fast\-paced environment
* Curious and proactive learner with interest in customer needs, solution design, and industry trends

**Nice\-to\-have qualifications**

* Early interest in specializing in areas such as CX consultancy, solution and product expertise, or industry\-focused solution engineering


**Why you'll love it here**  

  

* **Financial rewards \& recognition** \- A fair compensation aligned with your experience, industry, and market standards, performance\-driven bonuses, regular reviews to support your growth and recognize your contributions, and a culture that values your impact.
* **Flexible work arrangements** \- We combine in\-person collaboration with remote work and flexible working hours, because great ideas happen everywhere \- and not always between 9 and 5\.
* **ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan)** \- As an Infobip employee, you’ll have the opportunity to share in our company’s success through stock options.
* **Work\-life balance and Well\-being** \- We offer time off when you need it, special leave days for life’s big moments, and a flexible hybrid work model tailored to local regulations.
* **Career mobility** \- Your career is a journey. With internal mobility, upskilling, and mentorship, we help you shape your path.
* **Professional development** \- Learning never stops. Onboarding, mentorship, and training programs help you grow \- no matter where you start.
* **International mobility** \- Ready to take your career global? Explore short and long\-term opportunities in our Hubs worldwide.

  

*While some benefits may vary by location, our goal remains the same: to support your growth, well\-being, and success \- wherever you are.*
**Diversity drives connection**

**Infobip is built on diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and talents.** We’re proud to be an equal\-opportunity employer and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace.


No matter your race, gender, age, background, or identity — if you have the passion and skills to thrive, there’s a place for you here.


**All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, national origin, citizenship, disability, veteran status or any other part of one's identity.**

Read more about our hiring process.

title: Release Engineer
description:
Location


Biassono, Italy; Milan, Italy
Address


Via Parco, 47, Biassono, MB, 20853
Employment Type


Full time
Location Type


Hybrid
Department


Product Engineering
  
**Artificial Intelligence. Actual Impact.**
At Docebo, we’re using AI to change how people learn at work—and we mean actually change it. We’re an AI\-powered learning platform that helps organizations create, deliver, and manage training all in one place. But our real mission goes deeper: we help teams move faster, work smarter, and focus on the work that truly matters. Our platform is built with intelligent, time\-saving tools that personalize learning, eliminate busywork, and turn training from a checkbox into a superpower. The result? Better experiences for learners and real results for businesses.

  

We’re shaping the future of learning with a team that isn’t afraid to challenge the status quo. If you're excited by the idea of using AI to make work\-life better for real people–you’ll feel right at home here. And it’s not just what we build, it’s how we show up. At Docebo, our values aren’t just posters on the wall—they guide how we work every day. We call it the **Docebo Heart**: trust by default, assume positive intent, and create space for different perspectives to thrive.

  

So… what are you waiting for? Join 900\+ Docebians around the world and help us reinvent the way people learn, because learning never stops.

  

The **Release Engineer** oversees and orchestrates the software release lifecycle across our SaaS platform. The candidate will bridge the gap between Product Engineering, Cloud Infrastructure and Cloud Operations, focusing on standardising release processes while ensuring development teams maintain their speed and autonomy, responsible for enabling safe, predictable, lean, and compliant software delivery across the organisation.

**What You'll Do**

* **Governance \& Standardisation:** Define and maintain "Golden Standards" for the release process across all product teams to ensure consistency.
* **Interdependency Management:** Analyse and validate cross\-service dependencies prior to deployment, ensuring changes in "Service A" do not compromise the integrity of "Service B."
* **Risk Mitigation:** Assess risks associated with each release cycle, defining clear rollback plans and timely mitigation strategies.
* **Process Automation**: Collaborate with DevOps teams to automate release checklists and quality gates.
* **Communication Orchestration:** Act as the primary liaison between Engineering, Product, QA, and Security stakeholders to align release timelines and expectations.
* **Continuous Improvement:** Analyse post\-release metrics to identify bottlenecks and constantly optimise the workflow.
* **Enforce release readiness standards** across all teams, with the authority to block releases if unmitigated or unclear risks are identified, in collaboration with Engineering Leadership.
* **Track and communicate delivery blockers, dependencies, and risk indicators**, escalating issues to the appropriate teams or line managers to ensure timely resolution and maintain a predictable release pace.
* **Guarantee the company is always capable of deploying hotfixes for any service**, promoting and validating processes that favour the use of tested release candidates over cherry\-picked changes.

 **What it takes to be successful:**


To be successful as a **Release Engineer** in a modern SaaS environment, you need to move away from being a "gatekeeper" and become an **enabler**. The true measure of success is when the release process is so well\-structured that it becomes "boring"—meaning there are no surprises, no midnight emergencies, and no broken dependencies.

 **What We're Looking For**

* **Experience:** 4\+ years in Release Management, Release Engineering, or DevOps within SaaS/Cloud\-native environments.
* **CI/CD Mastery:** Proficiency with tools such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins.
* **Microservices Architecture:** Solid understanding of microservices, including API versioning, compatibility testing, and contract testing.
* **Deployment Strategies:** Hands\-on experience with Canary Releases, Blue\-Green deployments, and Feature Flag management.
* **Observability:** Ability to use monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Datadog) to validate release success in real\-time.
* **Pragmatism:** Ability to balance process rigour with the need for engineering flexibility and velocity.
* **Communication:** Excellent ability to translate complex technical risks into actionable insights for non\-technical stakeholders.
* **Resilience:** Remains calm and analytical when managing release\-related incidents or high\-pressure deployment windows.

**Our Hybrid Work Philosophy** 


Great work can happen anywhere but coming together helps us go further. Our team spends three days a week in the office (Tuesday\-Thursday) to collaborate, solve problems, and learn from each other. With flexibility the rest of the week, it’s a balance designed to help everyone do their best work and keep growing.

**Our Total Rewards Philosophy** 


Our Total Rewards Philosophy centers around three core areas to reward and care for our People:

* **Rewarding Impact:** We lead with competitive pay to reward the impact, skills and traits that fuel our success.
* **Fostering Holistic Wellbeing:** We care deeply about and invest in the whole person with programs that support our people’s physical, mental, and financial well\-being.
* **Empowering Our Talent Culture:** We build a culture of trust and empowerment by designing our rewards and benefits with transparency, equity, and flexibility, enabling our people to do their best work and stay for the long haul.

 **Our Promise to You**  

* **Financial Wellness:** Own a piece of Docebo through our Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP) at a 15% discount, plus a competitive compensation package.
* **Your Well\-Being, Covered:** You’ll get access to health benefits, so you can get the care you need when you need it.
* **Rest, Relax, Repeat:** Rest and recharge with paid vacation days, two company\-wide Docebo Days, floating holidays for cultural celebrations, and your birthday off!
* **Family First**: We provide coverage offering you time with your little one(s) so you can soak up all those precious moments. Fun fact: we had 30 Docebian babies join the family in 2025!
* **Connections That Count:** Connect with global communities through our Employee Resource Groups (including PRIDE, DWA, BIDOC, and Green Ambassadors) and company\-wide events that keep the fun rolling all year long.

**About Docebo** 


At Docebo, we create seamless, AI\-powered learning experiences for over 3,000 customers worldwide. We have successfully achieved two IPOs (TSX: DCBO \& NASDAQ: DCBO), been recognized as a top SaaS e\-learning solution, and are growing exponentially in the process. We're a global company, with office across North America, EMEA, APAC, and beyond. Our team is guided by six core values—**Innovation, Simplicity, Accountability, Togetherness, Curiosity, and Impact**—that shape everything we do. If this resonates with you, now is the perfect time to join one of the fastest\-growing learning technology companies in the world.


Docebo is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We are committed to diversity and inclusion in our workforce. All qualified applicants and employees will receive consideration for employment regardless of their race, colour, religion, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), national origin, citizenship status, age, disability, genetic information, or any other category protected under applicable law.


As a federal contractor, Docebo is committed to the principles of affirmative action and equal employment opportunity for protected veterans and individuals with disabilities. Docebo does not discriminate because of protected veteran status or on the basis of disability, and Docebo takes affirmative action to employ and advance in employment qualified protected veterans and individuals with disabilities.


Any individuals requiring a reasonable accommodation or would like to voluntarily disclose a disability or protected veteran status to assist with their employment application should send an e\-mail to recruiting\_accommodations@docebo.com. The email should also include the position you’re interested in.

title: Addetta/o back office commerciale

description:
Siamo nati come **Call2Net** , con oltre 15 anni di esperienza e un forte spirito innovativo che ci ha resi protagonisti nel mondo della Customer Interaction. Oggi siamo **TWY – There With You** : un’evoluzione che racconta la nostra visione ambiziosa e la volontà di accompagnare persone e brand verso un futuro di relazioni autentiche e digitalmente evolute.

  

Con 12 sedi operative in tutta Italia (Milano, Torino, Marcon, Prato, Roma, Casalnuovo di Napoli, Gallipoli, Maglie, Cagliari, Palermo, Ivrea e Catania) e la Sede di Iasi in Romania e più di 2\.000 collaboratori che lavorano per oltre 50 brand nazionali e internazionali di aziende clienti, offriamo soluzioni avanzate di customer care e digital outsourcing, dove tecnologie intelligenti – come l’hyper automation, l’AI e il martech – lavorano insieme alle persone per creare esperienze di valore.

  

Se cerchi un'azienda solida ma in continua trasformazione, dove crescere, innovare e contribuire a creare esperienze che fanno la differenza, il tuo posto è con noi.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

**TWY s.r.l** ricerca, per la sede di Milano, una figura junior di addetta/o alla reception e segreteria che svolgerà attività di accoglienza, comunicazioni e supporto amministrativo all'interno dell'Azienda.


Il ruolo richiede un'eccellente capacità di comunicazione, organizzazione ed un atteggiamento professionale per garantire un funzionamento efficiente e cordiale della reception e delle operazioni del reparto.

* Accoglienza dei visitatori e dei clienti con cortesia e professionalità registrandoli come da policy aziendale

* Supervisione delle aree comuni e delle sale riunioni con attività a supporto
* Supporto alla prenotazione e alla gestione delle trasferte
* Mantenere in ordine la reception e le aree comuni

**Requisiti:**
--------------

**Requisiti e competenze:**

* Diploma di scuola superiore
* Esperienza pregressa in un ruolo simile sarà apprezzata, ma non fondamentale
* Ottime capacità comunicative sia scritte che verbali
* Conoscenza degli strumenti informatici e dei programmi di office (principalmente Excel)
* Eccellenti capacità organizzative ed attenzione ai dettagli
* Capacità di lavorare in modo sia autonomo che in team
* Attitudine positiva e capacità di problem solving

**Cosa offriamo:**

* Contratto a tempo determinato full\-time (lunedì\- venerdì);
* Inserimento previsto a partire da giugno 2026;
* Convenzioni aziendali dedicate, siglate con alcuni dei nostri clienti e/o partner principali;

title: Commercial Strategy Trainee
description:
COMMERCIAL STRATEGY TRAINEE



CHI SIAMO



Da oltre 50 anni HEINEKEN è leader del settore birrario in Italia, con una quota di mercato del 33,3% e oltre 2\.000 collaboratori su tutto il territorio nazionale. Produciamo più di 6 milioni di ettolitri di birra ogni anno nei nostri quattro birrifici situati a Comun Nuovo (BG), Pollein (AO), Massafra (TA) e Assemini (CA), a cui si aggiunge il contributo fondamentale di Partesa, la nostra rete di distribuzione e servizi dedicata al canale Ho.Re.Ca.


Grazie a una solida identità locale e una presenza globale, HEINEKEN unisce innovazione e tradizione, producendo un impatto positivo sulle comunità in cui opera.



In HEINEKEN promuoviamo un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, collaborativo e stimolante, valorizzando le persone attraverso percorsi di crescita, formazione, welfare e opportunità di lavoro flessibile.


Abbracciare e celebrare la diversità è fondamentale per il Purpose di HEINEKEN: "Creare il piacere di stare insieme per ispirare un mondo migliore". Riteniamo che le persone, diverse come le nostre birre, anche e non solo per genere, etnia, età, orientamento sessuale, credo religioso, nazionalità, estrazione sociale, disabilità e stile di pensiero, arricchiscano le nostre vite e rafforzino la nostra attività. Accogliamo e prendiamo in considerazione le candidature di tutte le persone qualificate, in quanto sosteniamo una cultura di appartenenza che offre opportunità eque e paritarie per tuttə.



LA POSIZIONE E IL TEAM



HEINEKEN Italia è alla ricerca di una risorsa da inserire nell’HQ di Sesto San Giovanni nel team Trade Marketing. Come Commercial Strategy Trainee lavorerai al fianco dei team di vendita per la raccolta dei dati e la rielaborazione di informazioni di mercato altamente strategiche per il business On Trade, riportando al Channel Strategy Manager On Trade. In questo ruolo, avrai la possibilità di lavorare a un progetto che rimodellerà l'approccio al mercato della birra in Italia nel canale Horeca dei prossimi anni.



SEDE DI LAVORO: Sesto San Giovanni



FUNZIONE: Horeca



ATTIVITA’:


* Coordinare l'intero processo di RTM 2025 al fine di aggiornare il nostro database centrale, confrontando le informazioni provenienti dalle vendite con le fonti di terze parti.
* Co\-dirigere il roll\-out e fornire indicazioni al team di vendita nell'adozione di dashboard che rappresenteranno il risultato dell'analisi RTM;
* Monitorare settimanalmente e mensilmente le performance di vendita vs. RTM, individuando rischi ed opportunità.
* Contribuire alla progettazione del framework route\-to\-market 26 nel canale Horeca;
* Supporto alla forza vendita sell\-out nella gestione del sistema SFA con verifica e approvazione dell’inserimento dati.


REQUISITI:


* Hai spiccate doti analitiche e relazionali
* Sei una persona molto dinamica e curiosa
* Hai un buon livello di inglese e italiano
* Hai un’ottima conoscenza di Excel e Powerpoint


Perché lavorare con noi?



Entrare in HEINEKEN Italia significa far parte di una realtà dinamica, internazionale e in continua evoluzione, dove ogni persona ha l’opportunità di fare la differenza.  

Crediamo nella libertà di esprimere idee, nel valore della collaborazione e nello sviluppo continuo delle competenze individuali.  

Ci impegniamo ogni giorno per costruire un ambiente inclusivo, sostenibile e appassionante, dove il lavoro ha un impatto reale e ogni giornata è un’occasione per imparare, contribuire e divertirsi.



Segui la stella – scopri HEINEKEN e preparati a brillare ogni giorno, iniziando con energia e terminando con soddisfazione.

title: Temporary Accounting, Treasury & Trade Receivable Specialist.
description:
Temporary Accounting, Treasury \& Trade Receivable Specialist.

  



BIOTRONIK è un’azienda globale ed uno dei principali produttori di dispositivi medici in ambito cardiovascolare al mondo. Fondata a Berlino agli inizi degli anni ’60, è oggi presente in oltre 100 paesi, dove compie progressi cruciali nel mondo della cardiologia, ogni giorno. BIOTRONIK si avvale di persone altamente specializzate ed eccezionalmente qualificate: per fare questo, propone una formazione strutturata e continua alle proprie persone, attraverso training e certificazioni, al fine di assicurare una conoscenza approfondita dei devices e di conseguenza il miglior supporto al personale sanitario nel trattamento dei pazienti. Insieme possiamo migliorare la vita di molte persone e, molto spesso, anche salvarla.

  


Per il nostro dipartimento Finance, siamo oggi alla ricerca di un/una **Temporary Accounting, Treasury \& Trade Receivable Specialist.**

  



In questo ruolo, le tue responsabilità principali saranno:


* Gestione dell’anagrafica fornitori e registrazione delle fatture passive
* Verifica della correttezza contabile e fiscale dei documenti
* Registrazioni di prima nota e gestione dello scadenzario fornitori
* Riconciliazione fornitori e contabilità generale
* Gestione e archiviazione della documentazione contabile

  

  

Supporto alle attività di tesoreria:


* gestione della cassa (Italia e valute)
* predisposizione e registrazione dei bonifici
* registrazione incassi clienti e contabili bancarie
* gestione delle company credit card e dei rapporti con gli istituti bancari

  



Attività di credit management, tra cui:


* registrazione e riconciliazione incassi
* verifica delle partite aperte
* supporto alla corretta allocazione degli incassi in contabilità
* collaborazione con Finance e Sales per la risoluzione di anomalie di incasso


**I requisiti che devi avere per accedere alla posizione:**


* Diploma in Ragioneria e/o Laurea in discipline economiche
* Esperienza di almeno 3 anni in ruoli amministrativo‑contabili, preferibilmente in aziende strutturate o multinazionali
* Pregressa esposizione ad attività di tesoreria e gestione crediti (titolo preferenziale)
* Ottima conoscenza del pacchetto MS Office, in particolare Excel
* Conoscenza di SAP
* Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese (scritta e parlata)
* Precisione, affidabilità, capacità organizzativa e attitudine collaborativa


**Cosa offriamo:**


* Contratto di lavoro full\-time tempo determinato (iniziale di 12 mesi, con possibilità di proroga)
* Possibilità di lavoro da remoto fino a 8 giorni al mese
* Sede di lavoro Cologno Monzese
* Ticket restaurant
* Inquadramento e RAL commisurate all’esperienza

  

Ti interessa lavorare in BIOTRONIK Italia? Invia la tua candidatura attraverso il nostro application management system! Non vediamo l\`ora di portarti a bordo.

  


Saranno prese in considerazione tutte le candidature indistintamente, nel rispetto dei nostri valori ed in linea con la nostra cultura inclusiva.

title: Junior Helpdesk
description:
Siamo nati come **Call2Net** , con oltre 15 anni di esperienza e un forte spirito innovativo che ci ha resi protagonisti nel mondo della Customer Interaction. Oggi siamo **TWY – There With You** : un’evoluzione che racconta la nostra visione ambiziosa e la volontà di accompagnare persone e brand verso un futuro di relazioni autentiche e digitalmente evolute.

  

Con 12 sedi operative in tutta Italia (Milano, Torino, Marcon, Prato, Roma, Casalnuovo di Napoli, Gallipoli, Maglie, Cagliari, Palermo, Ivrea e Catania) e la Sede di Iasi in Romania e più di 2\.000 collaboratori che lavorano per oltre 50 brand nazionali e internazionali di aziende clienti, offriamo soluzioni avanzate di customer care e digital outsourcing, dove tecnologie intelligenti – come l’hyper automation, l’AI e il martech – lavorano insieme alle persone per creare esperienze di valore.

  

Se cerchi un'azienda solida ma in continua trasformazione, dove crescere, innovare e contribuire a creare esperienze che fanno la differenza, il tuo posto è con noi.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

**TWY s.r.l** in ottica di espansione del proprio organico, ricerca sulla Sede di **Milano** un profilo di **Junior Helpdesk.**

La risorsa sarà inserita all’interno del team IT e si occuperà di fornire **supporto tecnico di primo livello** agli utenti, garantendo un servizio efficiente e tempestivo.

 **Principali responsabilità:**

* Gestione e risoluzione dei ticket di assistenza tecnica (hardware e software)
* Supporto agli utenti nella risoluzione di problematiche informatiche di primo livello
* Configurazione e preparazione delle postazioni PC
* Installazione e aggiornamento di sistemi operativi e software applicativi
* Monitoraggio e presa in carico delle segnalazioni tramite sistema di ticketing
* Escalation delle problematiche più complesse ai livelli di supporto superiori

**Requisiti:**
--------------

* Diploma di Perito Informatico o titolo equivalente in ambito IT
* Buona conoscenza dei sistemi operativi (Windows, preferibile conoscenza base di altri OS)
* Familiarità con i principali software applicativi (es. pacchetto Office)
* Interesse per il settore IT e motivazione ad apprendere nuove tecnologie
* Buone capacità di problem solving
* Attitudine al lavoro in team
* Precisione, affidabilità e buone doti comunicative

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

* Contratto a tempo determinato full\-time (lunedì\- venerdì);

Milano

title: Project Controller Specialist
description:
Con 85 anni di esperienza nella realizzazione e gestione di infrastrutture del gas naturale, Snam è un operatore leader a livello europeo in tre principali ambiti di business: il trasporto, di cui detiene il primato con oltre 38\.000 km di rete in Italia e all’estero, lo stoccaggio, con un sesto dell’intera capacità dell’Unione Europea, e la rigassificazione, di cui è oggi il terzo player europeo, con una capacità annua gestita (o co\-gestita) pari a 28 miliardi di metri cubi.

Tra le principali società quotate italiane per capitalizzazione di mercato, Snam garantisce la sicurezza degli approvvigionamenti del Paese attraverso il proprio sistema di infrastrutture, abilita l’integrazione energetica fra diversi vettori e promuove progetti di decarbonizzazione funzionali alla competitività delle imprese e allo sviluppo dei territori.**Project Controller**

  


**Vuoi essere parte di una rete che unisce e sostiene?**

  



Nell’ambito dell’unità P\&C Gas Infrastructure, stiamo cercando una brillante risorsa con orientamento analitico che supporterà l’area di Project Control per le attività di competenza, con particolare focus sulla pianificazione e monitoraggio dell’avanzamento economico fisico dei progetti in portfolio.

  





**Perché dovresti considerare di unirti a noi?**



**Sfida strategica:** Collabora direttamente con i manager aziendali per sviluppare e implementare strategie e soluzioni innovative nel settore dell'energia.



**Crescita professionale**: avrai l'opportunità di guidare progetti complessi e influenzare il cambiamento organizzativo in un ambiente dinamico.



**Cultura aziendale**: siamo un team appassionato che da sempre valorizza il talento e promuove un ambiente di lavoro positivo e inclusivo. Vuoi far parte della nostra crescita?


* ️ **Settore in Crescita:** il mondo dell'energia è in continua trasformazione, e tu avrai la possibilità di essere al centro delle dinamiche di questo settore in evoluzione.

  


**Cosa farai in particolare:**


* Elaborazione piani di budget, forecast e piano strategico, unitamente al monitoraggio avanzamento fisico\-economico per progetti specifici.
* Supporto all’elaborazione, consolidamento, monitoraggio e controllo del piano, del budget e del forecast del portfolio investimenti.
* Supporto alle unità realizzatrici nelle attività di monitoraggio e controllo del processo realizzativo dei progetti in termini di tempi, costi e qualità.
* Supporto al reporting team nella analisi degli scostamenti dei consuntivi mensili e comparazione dei piani /forecast dei progetti di investimento.
* Supporto alla definizione e miglioramento di linee guida, metodologie, strumenti, KPI e modalità operative per le attività di pianificazione e controllo progetti.

  


**Cosa serve per unirti al nostro team?**  

* Laurea specialistica in: Ingegneria, Economia o Scienze Statistiche.
* Almeno 3/4 anni di esperienza lavorativa (preferibilmente con passata esperienza in project controlling).
* Ottima capacità di analisi, elaborazione dei dati e pianificazione economica.
* Ottima conoscenza del gestionale SAP.
* Disponibilità ad effettuare trasferte frequenti sul territorio (principalmente Crema/ Ravenna/ Piombino).

  


**Completano il profilo ideale**


* Conoscenza macro Excel.
* Familiarità con strumenti di Business Intelligence.
* Inglese fluente (livello B2 o superiore).
* Ottime doti relazionali / comunicative e capacità di interfacciarsi con tutti i livelli dell’organizzazione.
* Propensione al lavoro in team.
* Capacità organizzative e proattività.

  


**Sei tu la persona che stiamo cercando?**



Sei fortemente orientato al risultato e sei efficace sia nel lavoro in team che nella comunicazione a tutti i livelli organizzativi.  



Lavori in autonomia sapendo individuare e gestire le priorità con flessibilità, dinamismo e proattività.  



Pianifichi le attività e gestisci le scadenze in modo puntuale, utilizzando problem solving.  


**Cosa troverai in Snam**



Entrerai a far parte di una squadra che premia la proattività, la collaborazione e l’ambizione, dando il tuo contributo nella creazione di un futuro più sostenibile, da costruire insieme. Troverai un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e sfidante, dove la tua leadership e le tue competenze saranno valorizzate, mettendoti al servizio di un settore sempre più centrale per lo sviluppo del Paese ed il raggiungimento dei target europei di carbon neutrality al 2040\.



Inoltre, sono previsti:


+ **Benefit aziendali:** offriamo un ampio pacchetto di benefit, tra cui assicurazione sanitaria, scontistica e convenzioni, servizi legati a salute – famiglia – benessere e finanza personale, ticket restaurant e mensa aziendale.


+ **Sviluppo professionale:** investiamo nel tuo sviluppo con percorsi di formazione, opportunità di crescita, supporto e feedback continuo.


+ **Flessibilità lavorativa:** favoriamo un ambiente di lavoro flessibile, offrendo opzioni di Smart working e orari flessibili per migliorare il tuo equilibrio tra vita professionale e personale.


+ **Ambiente collaborativo:** ti invitiamo ad unirti ad un team dinamico, dove la tua unicità è apprezzata e la collaborazione è incoraggiata.



In Snam crediamo che la diversità sia la chiave per l’innovazione e il successo a lungo termine. Siamo impegnati a creare un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, dove ogni voce è ascoltata, rispettata e valorizzata. Promuoviamo azioni concrete per garantire l’equità nei processi di assunzione, sviluppo professionale e avanzamento di carriera incoraggiando la condivisione di opinioni e feedback.

Offriamo pari opportunità di lavoro a tutte le persone qualificate, basando le scelte aziendali su criteri oggettivi di coerenza con quello che cerchiamo.

I profili più in linea con la posizione saranno contattate e seguiranno l’iter di selezione.

Se sei pronto per una nuova sfida e ti rispecchi nel profilo che abbiamo descritto, inviaci la tua candidatura tramite il portale Carriere Snam. Per ulteriori informazioni contatta carriere@snam.it.

title: Manutentore Elettrico
description:
**Field of work:** Engineering \& Manufacturing
**Posting Date:** 23 Apr 2026
**Application deadline:**  

**Location:** Segrate 20054, Lombardy, Italy  

**Contract type:** Permanent  

**Job ID:** 4457

Role Description
**Sei una persona curiosa, precisa e appassionata di tecnologia? Ti entusiasma l’idea di lavorare su impianti complessi e garantire continuità a processi produttivi fondamentali? In LEO Pharma, realtà internazionale impegnata a migliorare la qualità della vita dei pazienti, stiamo cercando un Manutentore Elettrico per il nostro stabilimento di Segrate (MI). Un ruolo dinamico, ricco di sfide e con un impatto concreto sul nostro lavoro quotidiano.**  


**Unisciti a noi per costruire un’eredità futura nella dermatologia medica**

In LEO Pharma siamo leader globali nella dermatologia medica. In 115 anni di esperienza siamo stati pionieri nel portare innovazione nell’assistenza sanitaria. Ogni anno, i nostri prodotti migliorano la vita di milioni di persone  


Nel Maintenance condividiamo una mentalità orientata al “challenge accepted” e siamo guidati dai nostri winning behaviours: semplificazione, collaborazione e responsabilità, per raggiungere i nostri obiettivi.  


**Il tuo ruolo**

In questo ruolo sarai responsabile della gestione delle attività di manutenzione elettrica e di automazione sugli impianti di produzione e confezionamento. Lavorerai su linee ad alta tecnologia, intervenendo su guasti, ottimizzando le performance e contribuendo alla continuità operativa dello stabilimento. Sarai parte attiva nel mantenere elevati standard di sicurezza, qualità ed efficienza.  


**Attività principali:**
* Analisi e risoluzione di guasti elettrici su impianti di produzione e packaging e magazzino
* Supporto e sviluppo di semplici progetti di automazione con modifiche base a PLC, SCADA e sistemi HMI
* Interventi su apparecchiature elettroniche dedicate al controllo qualità e ispezione (vision systems, laser, ink‑jet, serializzazione e aggregazione Antares)
* Esecuzione di manutenzione elettrica ordinaria e straordinaria su macchine e impianti produttivi
* Collaborazione con i reparti interni per garantire continuità, sicurezza e miglioramento dei processi

  


**La tua esperienza**  



Per avere successo in questo ruolo, cerchiamo una persona con una solida preparazione tecnica e una forte attitudine al lavoro di squadra. Sono richiesti:
* Diploma tecnico in ambito elettrotecnico, elettronico o meccatronico
* 2–5 anni di esperienza in contesti industriali strutturati (farmaceutico, cosmetico, alimentare o simili)
* Conoscenza base della lingua inglese
* Capacità di problem solving, orientamento al risultato e attenzione al cliente interno
* Preferenziale: conoscenza di reti industriali (Ethernet, Profibus, Siemens H1\) e basi di programmazione PLC/HMI (Siemens Step 7, Elau, WinCC)

  



In LEO Pharma, crediamo che la collaborazione e la curiosità guidino il cambiamento. Se questi valori ti rispecchiano, vogliamo conoscerti!  


**Il tuo team**  



Entrerai a far parte del team Manutenzione, un gruppo competente, collaborativo e orientato alla qualità. Lavorerai a stretto contatto con colleghi di produzione, qualità e ingegneria, in un ambiente che valorizza la condivisione delle competenze e il miglioramento continuo. Riporterai direttamente al Maintenance Manager, che ti accompagnerà nel tuo percorso di crescita e integrazione.  


**Candidatura**

title: IIoT Engineer
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**

**Company Introduction**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.


We support our global manufacturing sites by developing digital and IIoT solutions that enhance operational excellence, data\-driven decision\-making, and smart manufacturing capabilities across EU and APAC regions.

**DESCRIPTION**


Join the PPI (Practical Process Improvement) Digital Transformation team at Thermo Fisher Scientific as an **IIoT Engineer**, where you will contribute to the design, implementation, and support of Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) solutions across multiple GMP\-regulated manufacturing sites.


You will be part of a **structured IIoT sub\-team**, working alongside with a Senior IIoT Engineer, and collaborating closely with Automation, IT, Data Engineering, Data Science, and Digital Project Management teams.


The role focuses on enabling reliable, secure, and scalable data acquisition from shop floor equipment to digital platforms, bridging OT and IT environments. Success in this position requires a hands\-on mindset, strong collaboration skills, and the ability to operate effectively in a multi\-site, matrix organization.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Conduct technical AS\-IS assessments of production lines through document analysis, shop floor walk\-throughs, and interviews with Operations, Maintenance, and Automation stakeholders.
* Design TO\-BE IIoT connectivity architectures using ISA\-95 principles and system modeling techniques.
* Configure, test, and support industrial gateways and edge solutions (e.g. Kepware, Ignition) for PLC integration and edge\-to\-cloud data pipelines (OPC UA, MQTT, Modbus TCP).
* Integrate PLCs and automation systems with IIoT platforms, ensuring data consistency, reliability, and performance.
* Test and troubleshoot OT networks and data pipelines, validating data quality, throughput, and stability.
* Collaborate with Data Engineering teams to ensure seamless ingestion of OT data into data lakes and analytics platforms.
* Participate in technical discussions and reviews with vendors, system integrators, and internal stakeholders, contributing alternative solutions and improvement proposals.
* Support validation and compliance activities by producing technical documentation (architecture diagrams, data flow models, configuration documentation, test evidence).
* Apply industrial cybersecurity and networking principles to ensure secure and reliable OT/IT integration.
* Contribute to digital transformation initiatives supporting smart manufacturing, predictive maintenance, OEE monitoring, and performance analytics.

**Site \& Collaboration Model**


The IIoT Engineer is expected to work effectively within a **distributed team**, collaborating remotely with colleagues across different manufacturing sites within EU/APAC sites.

**REQUIREMENTS**

**Minimum Qualifications**

* Technical diploma with **3–5 years of hands\-on experience** in OT/IT environments, **or**
* Bachelor’s degree in Automation Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or related STEM disciplines with relevant industrial experience.
* At least **2 years of experience** in automation, IIoT implementation, or system integration within manufacturing or process industries.
* Hands\-on experience with industrial communication protocols (OPC UA, MQTT, Modbus TCP).
* Experience configuring industrial gateways or edge platforms (e.g. Kepware, Ignition).
* Experience integrating PLCs (Siemens S7 preferred; B\&R or Rockwell acceptable).
* Working knowledge of IT/OT networking concepts (VLANs, subnetting, firewalls, DMZ).
* Familiarity with ISA\-95 models and system architecture diagramming tools.
* Basic knowledge of SQL databases and scripting for automation or data handling.
* Fluency in Italian and English (minimum B1 level for technical communication).

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Certifications in IIoT platforms or industrial communication standards.
* Experience in GMP/FDA\-regulated manufacturing environments and exposure to Computerized System Validation (CSV).
* Experience with SCADA systems (Ignition, GE iFix, Wonderware).
* Familiarity with cloud IoT services (Azure IoT Hub, AWS IoT Core).
* Exposure to data ingestion, streaming architectures, or event\-driven systems.
* Experience in digital manufacturing, pharmaceutical, or multi\-site environments.
* Background in system integrators, OEMs, or industrial solution providers.

**Key Competencies \& Soft Skills**

* Structured problem\-solving mindset with the ability to analyze complex OT/IT systems.
* Strong collaboration skills across Automation, IT, Operations, Data Engineering, and Project Management teams.
* Openness to technical guidance, peer review, and standardized ways of working within the IIoT domain.
* Hands\-on and pragmatic approach with strong troubleshooting capabilities.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and execute tasks under technical leadership.
* Attention to detail in technical documentation and configuration activities.
* Effective communication skills, including the ability to explain technical topics to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Adaptability to work across multiple sites, regions, and cultural contexts (EU/APAC).
* Strong commitment to reliability, safety, and quality in GMP\-regulated environments.

**Additional Information**

* Occasional travel may be required to support site activities and collaboration (**estimated 0–25%**).

description:
2026/04 \| Milan
**IFOM** is an internationally recognized non\-profit cancer research institute supported by the Italian Association for Cancer Research (AIRC), based in Milan within a highly dynamic urban environment.


IFOM’s continuous success is ensured by the recruitment of highly competitive undergraduate, graduate, and post\-graduate researchers worldwide, with over 24 countries currently represented at IFOM.


IFOM labs are hosted within a research campus shared with the European Institute of Oncology and the Italian Institute of Technology.


IFOM is committed to creating a safe and inclusive work environment, based on mutual respect and the enhancement of diversity, offering equal job opportunities to all qualified candidates.


We seek for our Institute: **Postdoctoral position in Bardelli Lab**

  

**About the position**
----------------------


The internationally recognized Bardelli Laboratory at IFOM ETS, the AIRC Institute of Molecular Oncology in Milano, invites applications for a postdoctoral researcher to work on a project focused on understanding the relationship between RNA decay and immunogenic
### **Department overview**


The position is in the Bardelli Lab, under the supervision of Dr Pietro Paolo Vitiello https://www.ifom.eu/it/ricerca\-cancro/ricerca\-lab/ricerca\-lab\-bardelli.php


### **Profile Description**


We are seeking an independent scientist with a PhD degree and excellent skills in molecular oncology and immunology. Methods will include cell culture, drug screenings, genetic perturbations, multi\-omics, and animal experiments.


Your efforts will aim to identify and validate new immunotherapy approaches for immune refractory colorectal tumors.


### **Language skills**


Proficiency in English for speaking and writing – English is the working language at the Institute.


### **Required skills**


* Great communication skills and strong motivation to work in a collaborative and constructive lab environment
* Good knowledge of cancer biology and in vitro pharmacology
* Demonstrated hands\-on experience with human and mouse cell culture and common molecular biology techniques
* Demonstrated hands\-on experience with animal cancer models

### **Additionally desired skills**


* Advanced skills in data analysis and graphical processing
* Familiarity with bioinformatic analyses and interpretation of genomic/transcriptomic data will be considered a plus

### **Educational experience**


PhD degree in Molecular Medicine/Oncology, Experimental Cancer Immunology, or related fields.


### **What we offer**


* International work environment, Flextime, Guest house inside the campus, Discount agreements for gym, pharmacy, psychology services, and various shops around the IFOM area, Bar and canteen inside the campus \& lunch benefit, Company nursery, Continuous support to candidates and their families (housing, schooling, national health system registration, work permit, etc.) through the Welcome Office, Medical service, Laptop, CAF service – tax declaration

### **Type of Contract**


Annual renewal fellowship (post\-doc)


### **Location**


Milan – Scalo di Porta Romana area


### **Contacts**


Candidates should send their CV together with a cover letter describing their interest in applying for the role and explaining how they meet the set criteria, along with contact details of their referees, to**pietropaolo.vitiello@ifom.eu****.**


Consideration of applications will begin as they are received and will continue until the position is filled.

title: Young Researcher in Molecular Cell Biology
description:
IRCCS San Raffaele Scientific Institute in Milan–Italy, is looking for a young motivated researcher to join the Cell Adhesion Laboratory directed by Prof. Ivan de Curtis. The candidate will work on a project aimed at the analysis of molecular\-cellular mechanisms implicated in tumor cell invasion, to identify new targets to interfere with the formation of metastases. The project financed by AIRC is dealing with the functional characterization of a molecular network that regulates the protrusive activity of invasive tumor cells (de Curtis I, 2021, Trends Cell Biol, doi: 10\.1016/j.tcb.2020\.12\.002; Pehkonen H, de Curtis I, 2021, Oncogene doi: 10\.1038/s41388\-021\-02048\-1\). This protein network includes the scaffold proteins Liprin\-a1 and ERC1 (Ribolla, de Curtis I, 2025, Commun Biol, doi: 10\.1038/s42003\-025\-08470\-5\) and regulatory enzymes (Ramella, de Curtis, 2024, iScience doi: 10\.1016/j.isci.2024\.109440; Ripamonti M, de Curtis I, 2022, Commun Biol doi: 10\.1038/s42003\-022\-03989\-3\) undergoing liquid\-liquid phase separation to regulate the invasive properties of breast cancer cells, and to promote the turnover of adhesions and invasion. The candidate will contribute by investigating mechanisms linking Liprin\-a1 and ERC1 proteins to the organization and function of the migratory activity of cancer cells. For this, the candidate will learn and apply cloning to prepare wt/mutant constructs, high resolution confocal microscopy on fixed and live cells, biochemical/molecular cell biology approaches including transfections with siRNAs and plasmids for the KO (CRISPR/Cas9\) of endogenous proteins, functional assays to assess effects on tumor cell invasion.
  
  

Applicants are requested to send an email to decurtis.ivan@hsr.it including:
  
a CV with name(s) and contact(s) (email, phone) of at least one Referee; a brief description of known techniques and previous research experience;
  
a motivation letter describing the interest in joining this lab, and previous experimental experiences. Both postdoctoral candidates and young post\-master degree candidates will be considered, pending their strong motivation in learning approaches applied to important aspects of cancer cell biology.
  
  

**Main activities:**  

See text above.
  
  

**Who we are looking for:**  

A motivated young researcher enthusiastic about learning molecular\-cell biology to address important mechanisms underlying tumor cell invasion.
  
  

**Work details:**  

**Type of contract:** Fellowship/CoCoCo;
  
**Duration:** 12 months renewable;
  
**Place of work:** San Raffaele Scientific Institute, Dibit, via Olgettina 58, 20132 Milano.
  
  

At San Raffaele Scientific Institute, a world\-renowned center of excellence for clinical and scientific activities, we believe that considering diversity and promoting an open and inclusive environment is crucial to our success. We are committed to ensure that equal employment opportunities are provided and based on merit without regard to age, religion, sex, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, cultural and social backgrounds, gender identity or expression, national or ethnic origin, or any other legally recognized status entitled to protection under applicable laws. We offer attractive conditions and rewards appropriate to an internationally competitive research organization.

The new E.ON is one of the strongest operators of European energy networks and energy\-related infrastructure, as well as a provider of advanced customer solutions for more than 50 million customers. With a total of over 75,000 employees, we are represented in 15 countries. This makes us ideally positioned to help drive Europe's energy transition. By focusing on two sustainable growth areas fully commits itself to the fundamental transformation of the energy world. As one of Europe’s largest energy service providers we will actively drive the energy transition in Italy and Europe. E.ON is a pioneer in developing new and innovative energy solutions and attract the brightest minds in the energy sector.


**Our Team**
------------


Within the AP/AR department, you work closely with the AP/AR Team Leader and collaborate daily with business units, legal entities, and the Group Business Service Center. The focus lies on taking ownership of end\-to\-end accounting processes while contributing to continuous improvement and audit readiness. Close cooperation across functions enables shared goals to be achieved and supports growth\-oriented collaboration grounded in trust, integrity, and accountability.

**Your Field of Play**
----------------------

* **End\-to\-end ownership of billing and revenue accounting**  

Mass billing and revenue data are analyzed, posted, and reconciled by you, ensuring accuracy across multiple business units and legal entities while delivering exceptional customer outcomes through reliable financial data
* **Steering revenue streams across entities with precision**  

Different revenue streams are actively managed and invoiced in a structured manner, keeping a clear overview of financial impacts and supporting timely, compliant reporting
* **Ensuring compliant supplier invoice processes**  

Supplier invoices are reviewed, validated, and monitored in close interaction with the Group BSC, enabling you to take full ownership of results and secure high\-quality AP processes
* **Acting as a financial interface for cross\-functional stakeholders**  

Accounting and documentation issues are clarified directly with internal stakeholders, applying an analytical approach to solve root causes and maintain smooth operational flows
* **Managing statutory registers and compliance requirements**  

Accounting and tax registers are maintained and monitored by you, including VAT compliance and Intrastat reporting, embedding regulatory requirements reliably into daily work
* **Driving process transparency and audit readiness**  

Relevant AP/AR processes are mapped, monitored, and continuously improved, supporting internal and external audits with clear documentation and resilient execution
* **Supporting transformation through projects and systems**  

New processes, ERP solutions, and area\-specific applications are analyzed, tested, and implemented with curiosity and adaptability, recognising change as an opportunity to improve efficiency and quality

**Are You Our Playmaker?**
--------------------------

* **Educational background in finance or accounting**  

A completed Bachelor’s degree equips you with a solid theoretical foundation for accounting, reporting, and compliance responsibilities
* **Strong knowledge of accounting standards and regulations**  

Confident application of the main national (OIC) and international accounting principles IFRS/IAS, VAT regulations, withholding taxes, and electronic invoicing ensures compliant and reliable financial processes
* **Hands\-on experience in AP/AR and reconciliation activities**  

Practical exposure to accounts payable and receivable processes enables you to manage complex data sets autonomously and with strong result orientation
* **Confident use of SAP S/4 HANA in finance processes**  

Daily work with SAP S/4 HANA, particularly FI, SD, MM, and VIM or e\-Document, allows you to leverage systems effectively and optimise accounting workflows
* **Delivering exceptional customer outcomes through collaboration**  

By collaborating effectively across teams and functions, you build trust, anticipate internal customer needs, and contribute to a high\-performing finance environment
* **Analytical mindset paired with resilience in change**  

Complex situations are tackled confidently, data\-driven decisions are made consistently, and results are delivered even in demanding phases
* **Clear communication in an international context**  

Professional English skills support transparent communication with internal and external stakeholders, complemented by a proactive and structured communication style


**Do you have questions?**


If you are convinced that this is the next step in your career, register and apply online (Job Req ID: 244180 ).  

Shaping the future of energy together!

**What you need to know:**


Contract type: Permanent  

Working time: Full time  

Company: E.ON Italia S.p.A.  

Function area: Finance/Accounting/Tax


This job posting is open to all genders, in compliance with Legislative Decree No. 198 of April 11, 2006, “Code of Equal Opportunities between Men and Women,” and to individuals of all ages and nationalities, in compliance with EU Directive 2000/78/EC on equal treatment in employment


### **Inclusion**



It is important to us that people with disabilities have access to a fair application process, providing them with an opportunity to shine. Therefore, our representative body for severely disabled people will be included in the process from an early stage. Please let us know via the application form if you require technical or organisational adjustments during the application process. We will strive to make the required aids available.



Should you not be able to apply online and want to speak someone in person, please contact your local recruiter.

title: Test Engineer
description:
**Location:**Saronno, IT
**Test Engineer – Healthcare (Surgical)**
 **Saronno, Italy**

Barco Healthcare is looking for a hands‑on Test Engineer to join our R\&D team and support the development and industrialisation of next‑generation surgical products.  

In this role, you will work in an international, multidisciplinary R\&D environment, playing a key part in ensuring product quality, safety, and regulatory compliance throughout the product development lifecycle.

**Your Role**
As a Test Engineer, you will support **New Product Introduction (NPI)** projects by planning, executing, and coordinating verification and validation activities. You will work closely with engineering, industrialisation, quality, and external partners to ensure our products meet **international medical device standards** and Barco’s high‑quality expectations.

**Key Responsibilities**
* Analyse design inputs, project specifications, and regulatory requirements
* Define and execute test plans in collaboration with NPI project managers
* Perform verification and validation testing across different development stages
* Support and execute:
	+ **Environmental testing** (climatic, vibration)
	+ **EMC testing**
	+ **Electrical safety testing**
* Coordinate testing activities with external laboratories and notified bodies
* Conduct gap and conformity analysis against applicable international standards
* Support industrialisation activities, including zero‑series and pre‑series builds
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of testing processes, documentation, and tools
* Collaborate effectively with local teams and Barco headquarters


**Your Profile**
* Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics, or equivalent experience
* Hands‑on experience in a laboratory or test environment
* Exposure to testing, validation, or certification activities
* Ability to work independently, organise work, and take initiative
* Strong communication skills and a structured, analytical mindset
* Fluent in Italian and English

  


**Strong Plus**
* Experience in the **medical device / healthcare industry**
* Familiarity with **EMC, environmental, and electrical safety testing**
* Knowledge of medical device standards (e.g. **IEC 60601 series**)
* Background in testing laboratories, notified bodies, or other regulated industries

  


**What We Offer**
* A role in innovative healthcare technology that directly impacts patient care
* Exposure to cutting‑edge surgical products
* An international working environment with strong cross‑functional collaboration
* Opportunities for learning, development, and internal growth
* Minimal travel requirements

  


️ We are committed to conducting our business activities with the highest standards of integrity, responsibility and compliance across all aspects of our operations. This includes adherence to applicable laws, regulations and internal policies related to ethical conduct, quality standards, cyber security, sustainability, data protection \& confidentiality and safety.


**D\&I Statement**  

At Barco, innovation drives everything we do. We believe that diversity fuels creativity, bringing us closer to our colleagues and customers. Inclusion and equity aren't just values—they're core capabilities that propel us toward our shared goals and mission.

title: Event Coordinator Intern
description:

With access to the latest tools, information and training, we’ll help you in advancing your skills and career. Here, you’ll be supported in progressing – whatever your ambitions.

  

At Boston Scientific, you will find a collaborative culture driven by a passion for innovation that keeps us connected on the most essential level. With determination, imagination and a deep caring for human life, we’re solving some of the most important healthcare industry challenges. Together, we’re one global team committed to making a difference in people’s lives around the world. This is a place where you can find a career with meaningful purpose—improving lives through your life’s work.

EDUCARE Proctor Bureau (EPB) is a department within Medical Education, dedicated to support Health Care Professional training for new advanced technologies. The core objective of this team is to organize the proctor activities to ensure a smooth execution of a train the trainer program where a Physician expert is used as a consultant to train a Physician in training, in compliance with European and local rules and regulations.

* Establish Healthcare Professionals contracts and administrative documentation according to internal rules and regulations.
* Follow up on proctors’ invoices with supporting documentation and in accordance with internal compliance rules.
* Ensure logistics and communication when organizing meetings/sessions involving proctors.
* Prepare monthly KPI reporting.

* Update Physicians information in eCare platform.
* Collect and report any discrepancies, bugs in eCare.

* Fluent in English (B2\+), French is a plus.
* Process development and optimization mindset
* Good knowledge and confidence in Office package

We do not and will not make any personnel decisions (like recruiting, hiring, job assignments, and promotions) based on a person’s age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law.*

Boston Scientific transforms lives through innovative medical technologies that improve the health of patients around the world. As a global medical technology leader for more than 45 years, we advance science for life by providing a broad range of high\-performance solutions that address unmet patient needs and reduce the cost of healthcare. Our portfolio of devices and therapies helps physicians diagnose and treat complex cardiovascular, respiratory, digestive, oncological, neurological and urological diseases and conditions. title: Customs Responsible Italy (f/m/d)
description:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**


Join us as the Customs Country Responsible for Italy, where you will be the go\-to customs expert and primary contact for all customs\-related matters. You will take charge of organizing and continuously enhancing the customs department, ensuring alignment with the Global Customs Internal Control Program and compliance with Italian customs and trade regulations. Imagine leading a team that drives efficiency and compliance while navigating the complexities of customs legislation and trade compliance. Your role will be pivotal in shaping the future of our customs operations and supporting our mission for sustainable business practices.


**How You’ll Make an Impact**

* You will implement and continuously monitor the Siemens Energy Customs Internal Control Program (ICP) to ensure compliance and efficiency.
* Stay ahead of the curve by monitoring new customs legislation, regulatory changes, and emerging trends that impact our business.
* Develop, implement, and maintain sustainable customs processes that align with our organizational goals.
* Act as the key communication channel between the customs function and Siemens Energy businesses, ensuring visibility on new strategies and organizational changes.
* Provide expert guidance on trade compliance topics for national and regional projects, while coordinating with external business partners like customs brokers.

**What You Bring**

* You hold a complete university degree in Business Administration, Law, or International Trade.
* You have at least 5 years of experience in the field of customs, showcasing your expertise.
* International experience, whether through working in international teams or abroad, is a valuable asset.
* Proficiency in customs/ERP IT systems such as SAP or MIC is essential.
* You are fluent in both Italian and English, with strong organizational capabilities and assertive communication skills.

**About the Team**


You will be part of a dynamic team that thrives in an exciting environment, tackling challenging projects that make a real difference. Our team is dedicated to professional development, offering strong support and collaboration with colleagues from around the globe. You will enjoy a growing function that fosters a dynamic, informal, and inspiring working atmosphere, where your contributions will carry significant responsibility and impact.


**Who is Siemens Energy?**


At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With \+100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world’s electricity generation.



Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150\-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.

**Our Commitment to Diversity**


Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity, we generate power. We run on inclusion, and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character—no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.


**Rewards/Benefits*** Enjoy a stable employment in a company with a long history in innovation and technology.
* Flexibility: trustful environment with an inclusive and flexible way of working driven by results; hybrid and remote working enabled by innovative tools and devices, personal computer and smartphone; wi\-fi connection reimbursement.
* Welfare: flexible welfare programs and health insurance extendable to your family; professional and extraprofessional accident insurance; free on\-site lunch options.
* Collaborate with experienced experts in an international environment.
* The professional and personal development of our employees is very important to us. With us, you have the opportunity to learn and develop in a self\-determined way. Various attractive programs and measures are available for this purpose.


\#LI\-Hybrid

  

\[Regional Statements]
